description: Sam Lehman discusses the evolution of reinforcement learning and its implications for decentralized AI, emphasizing modular models and the potential for plug-and-play experts. He reflects on the shift from pre-training to inference and the inevitability of distributed AI, while considering the challenges posed by proprietary systems.
topic_summary: Lehman explores the future of decentralized AI, focusing on modular mixture of experts models and the transition from pre-training to inference. He highlights the need for innovation and collaboration in AI development amidst concerns over proprietary systems.
